image_prompt_master: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface.
image_prompt_scene: scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge.
image_prompt_characters: character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand.
image_prompt_props: prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: steaming then cold, must remain visually consistent.
image_prompt_shot: shot S011. camera intent: comic_panel_02. action beats: Protagonist A holds a key in his hand.; The steam from the red mug suddenly dissipates, turning cold like a sigh. narration intent: Narrator explains "他握住钥匙，杯子里的热气立刻变冷，像一口叹息。". dialogue mood: Protagonist A says "你想让我过去？". shot positive notes: A man holding a key, a red mug on a table, steam rising then fading, cold atmosphere, dim kitchen lighting, cinematic, moody, close-up on hand and mug.
image_prompt_final: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge. character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand. prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: steaming then cold, must remain visually consistent. shot S011. camera intent: comic_panel_02. action beats: Protagonist A holds a key in his hand.; The steam from the red mug suddenly dissipates, turning cold like a sigh. narration intent: Narrator explains "他握住钥匙，杯子里的热气立刻变冷，像一口叹息。". dialogue mood: Protagonist A says "你想让我过去？". shot positive notes: A man holding a key, a red mug on a table, steam rising then fading, cold atmosphere, dim kitchen lighting, cinematic, moody, close-up on hand and mug.
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, bright, sunny, cartoonish, low detail, face drift, outfit change, prop drift, wrong set layout, extra fingers, text artifacts, subtitles burned into image, logo, watermark

reference_images.note: wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right
table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp
rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 他握住钥匙，杯子里的热气立刻变冷，像一口叹息。

manual_workflow.external_generation: paste image_prompt_final and negative_prompt into any web image/video tool; upload reference_images when supported
